title: Undertale Disks
description: Replaces original music disk tracks with Undertale OST
body:
# Undertale Disks

- [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Undertale_Soundtrack)
- [Bandcamp](https://tobyfox.bandcamp.com/album/undertale-soundtrack)

Why is this resource pack better than any other that claims to do that same?

- Preserves original game text and only modifies disk names
- Guarantees complete playback, ensuring no track cuts short. Note that because the original songs are longer, the jukebox will continue "playing" silence until the full track time is complete
- Features a curated selection of best Undertal tracks :)

| Icon | Original | Replaced |
